sn48.3:1.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these five faculties. What five? The faculty of faith … the faculty of wisdom.
sn48.3:1.2: "When, bhikkhus, a noble disciple understands as they really are the origin and the passing away, the gratification, the danger, sn.v.194 and the escape in the case of these five faculties, then he is called a noble disciple who is a stream-enterer, no longer bound to the nether world, fixed in destiny, with enlightenment as his destination."
